===================
===================
=== BOB DYLAN 1976-04-25 Gainesville, Florida (audiowhore repair).txt
===================
===================
===================

BOB DYLAN and the
Rolling Thunder Revue - part II

University Of Florida Field
Gainesville, Florida
25 April 1976


01. Mr. Tambourine Man
02. Simple Twist Of Fate
03. Vincent van Gogh
04. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
05. Maggie's Farm
06. One Too Many Mornings
07. Isis

08. Blowin' In The Wind
09. Dink's Song 
10. Railroad Boy
11. I Pity The Poor Immigrant
12. Shelter From The Storm
13. I Threw It All Away
14. Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues
15. One More Cup Of Coffee (Valley Below) 
16. Going, Going, Gone
17. Mozambique
18. Lay, Lady, Lay
19. Idiot Wind
20. Knockin' On Heaven's Door
21. Gotta Travel On


======

1-2 Bob solo acoustic
3 with Bobby Neuwirth
8-11 with Joan Baez
21 with Roger McGuinn
21 ensemble

======


audiowhore repair project - 1976

source used: LB-4308 (Master > CDR > EAC > FLAC)
LB grades that a C- and even after the repairs that this is still a C recording.

Notes about this recording:
- all thanks to the taper for being there
- mono recording
- pitch was too low and speed too slow
- i found that the sound altered throughout from being between 0.18 Semitones to 0.26 Semitones off pitch
- nothing from this show has been officially released.
- only recorded performance of Dink's Song during the Rolling Thunder Revue tours
- tape flips after tracks 7, 10 and 18
- abrupt cut at end of track 12.


What i have done:
- adjust pitch and speed for each song individually to correct
- fix SBEs
- eq mixing to better balance sound
- some hard limit on loud clapping
- tape flips, minor dropouts, microphone bumps cleaned/manually removed
- cut near the start of Knockin' On Heaven's Door cleaned up
- No Noise or hiss reduction used.


Notes about other versions of this show:
I believe that LB-3018, LB-3593, LB-3684, LB-4308 and LB-11490 are all derived from the same recording.
LB-1674 is a far superior sounding second source but sadly that recording only captured the opening RTR set and then the first 8 minutes of Bob's first set.
Security then shut down the taper 2 minutes into Simple Twist Of Fate. 
One of the great lost Bob recording opportunities as it is an amazing sounding recording. 
It could have been the best audience tape from the Rolling Thunder Review tours.
An example of when extending favours backfires and everyone loses out.
I have not mixed the 2 songs from LB-1674 with LB-4308 as some others have done.


========

Rolling Thunder Revue part II ensemble:

Bob Dylan
Rob Stoner (bass)
Scarlet Rivera (violin)
T-bone J. Henry Burnette (guitar & piano)
Steven Soles (guitar)
Mick Ronson (guitar)
Bobby Neuwirth (guitar & vocal)
Roger McGuinn (guitar & vocal)
David Mansfield (steel guitar, mandolin, violin & dobro)
Howie Wyeth (drums)
Gary Burke (congas).

========

If you have enjoyed hearing this repaired version of Gainesville 1976, it is one of many shows that I have repaired and am continuing to work on.
I will keep sharing these on Dime if the following requests are respected:
- Do not post this audio on youtube
- Do not repost anywhere in mp3 or degraded sound quality (youtube can be worse resolution than mp3!)
- Do not repost this on other sites. I can and will do that if there is a reason it should be shared at other places. Just message me about this!
- Retain this info file and credit appropriately
- Not for sale or profit, for free sharing only.

========

Thanks to: the taper (please contact me of you're out there), Les Kokay and his 'Songs of the Underground' publication, LosslessBob, Dylanchords.com, and my Cambridge friends.

========

First posted to Dime on the 45th anniversary of this concert.

===================

===================
===================
=== ORIGINAL Notes.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 4/25/76, Gainesville, Florida, University Of Florida Field, 2CDR

Master > CDR > EAC > FLAC.

Notes:-only recorded performance of Dink's Song during the Rolling Thunder Revue tours. 
While reportedly performed at Gatesville 5/15, as well, no recording of that performance has surfaced to date; 

disc 1, 
1. Mr. Tambourine Man, 
2. Simple Twist Of Fate, 
3. Vincent van Gogh (Robert Friemark), 
4. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight, 
5. Maggie's Farm, 
6. One Too Many Mornings, 
7. Isis (Bob Dylan, Jacques Levy/Bob Dylan), 
8. Blowin' In The Wind, 
9. Dink's Song (trad. arr. by John & Alan Lomax), 
10. Railroad Boy (trad.), 
11. I Pity The Poor Immigrant, 

disc 2, 
1. Shelter From The Storm, 
2. I Threw It All Away, 
3. Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues, 
4. One More Cup Of Coffee (Valley Below), 
5. Going, Going, Gone, 
6. Mozambique (Bob Dylan, Jacques Levy/Bob Dylan), 
7. Lay Lady Lay, 8. Idiot Wind, 
9. Knockin' On Heaven's Door, 
10. Gotta Travel On (Paul Clayton-Larry Ehrlich-David Lazar-Tom Six)

===================
===================
===================
